task_completion.description: Load the parcels and road network layers into the GIS application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layers panel shows both 'subdivision_parcels' and 'road_network' loaded in the GIS application (e.g., QGIS).

task_completion.description: Identify parcels that are isolated from the road network
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spatial selection tool (like 'Select by Location') is configured to find parcels disjoint from roads, OR exactly 2 parcels (the center and top-middle of the 3x3 grid) are highlighted/selected on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Reproject the data to EPSG:32610 (WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reprojection dialog (e.g., 'Reproject Layer' or within 'Save Vector Layer') shows the target CRS set to 'EPSG:32610' or 'WGS 84 / UTM zone 10N'.

task_completion.description: Create a 10-meter buffer around the isolated parcels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Buffer' tool dialog is visible with a distance of '10' (meters) applied to the isolated parcels, OR a new layer showing slightly larger buffered polygons around the 2 isolated parcels is visible on the map.

task_completion.description: Save the final buffered result to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer' dialog shows the output file path exactly as '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/easement_buffers.geojson', OR this file is visible in the GIS Browser panel or a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS or another GIS GUI, rather than using terminal commands or Python scripts to bypass the interface and generate the output.

integrity.description: The agent used actual spatial analysis tools to identify and buffer the parcels
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using tools like 'Select by Location' and 'Buffer', rather than manually drawing polygons or faking the output.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output to the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path in the save dialog or file explorer strictly matches '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/easement_buffers.geojson' without typos.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data consists of a 3x3 grid of 100m x 100m parcels with a U-shaped road network along the left, bottom, and right edges. Exactly 2 parcels (center and top-middle) are landlocked and isolated from the roads. The final output must contain exactly 2 buffered features. A 10m buffer on these parcels results in an area of approximately 14,313.65 m² per feature. The output must be saved to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/easement_buffers.geojson.
